programs.title: NBN News
programs.desc: NBN presents the latest in news, sport and weather locally, nationally and around the world.

programs.title: A Current Affair
programs.desc: A Current Affair covers the realms of politics, crime, human rights, science, technology, celebrities and entertainment - all investigated by a dedicated team.

programs.title: Events That Changed Australia
programs.desc: Our national game used to be available to only half of the population - until women became an unstoppable force on the Australian sporting field.

programs.title: Outback Murder Highway
programs.desc: Flinders Highway is dubbed Australia's most dangerous road, haunted by unsolved crimes. Experts reinvestigate how one young man could vanish without a trace. Every clue, every dead end and lead in Tony Jones' case is back in play.

programs.title: The Killer Interview with Piers Morgan
programs.desc: Piers Morgan speaks with some of the most notorious killers in the US. Kimberly Saenz, a nurse convicted of murdering her dialysis patients by injecting them with bleach, gives her first ever interview.

programs.title: 9News Late
programs.desc: Join the 9News Late team for all of today's top stories from Australia and around the world.
